overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a modern urban waterfront area on a sunny afternoon. The character moves from an open plaza past a city bus and flower beds, through a covered construction scaffolding walkway, and emerges into a palm-lined promenade with other pedestrians and a crashed vehicle visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront promenade with modern architecture and blue canopy structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved promenade, passing by a city bus and flower beds on the left while approaching a tree-lined street

entered.detail: large blue fabric canopy structure with curved design visible in the distance
white and blue public transit bus parked along the promenade
contemporary building with glass facade and blue trim
raised planter bed with purple flowers and greenery
illuminated advertisement display showing pink graphics

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide open waterfront promenade on a sunny afternoon. A distinctive blue sail-like canopy structure dominates the right side while a city bus and modern glass building line the left. The area features decorative flower beds and scattered trees with clear skies overhead.

events.description: character enters covered construction scaffolding walkway with wooden flooring

agents.ego_description: walking forward and entering the covered construction walkway, passing under the metal scaffolding structure

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with curved glass facade
large commercial advertisement billboard with red and white graphics
metal scaffolding structure with overhead covering spanning the walkway
red and white plastic construction barriers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a tree-lined street approaching a construction zone. A modern glass tower rises on the left while the path leads toward a covered scaffolding walkway. The city bus moves from the left to the right side of the frame as the character passes it, and construction barriers become visible along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered construction walkway with scaffolding overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed construction corridor on wooden planks, passing portable toilets and construction materials

entered.detail: blue portable sanitation unit positioned against the construction wall
wooden plywood sheets covering the construction site wall
small yellow and black utility cart parked within the construction area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed construction walkway covered by metal scaffolding overhead. The ground is wooden planks, and the area features construction barriers, portable toilets, and plywood sheets lining the walls. The sky is completely obscured by the scaffolding structure as the character moves through this temporary corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees and event setup

events.description: exits covered scaffolding into bright open waterfront area with palm trees
encounters crashed vehicle and group of pedestrians in the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along the open promenade observing the crashed vehicle and other pedestrians ahead, moving toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and red shorts walking ahead on the promenade

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the waterfront path
damaged futuristic vehicle or bus wreckage with debris scattered around
blue and yellow triangular pennant banners strung across the building facade
distant mountain range visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the scaffolding into a bright open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. The scene features decorative banners, a crashed vehicle on the right, and several other pedestrians walking ahead. Mountains are visible in the distance across the water, and the area has a festive atmosphere with clear afternoon sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunny urban plaza through a confined construction zone and back into an open coastal promenade. It begins along a waterfront path characterized by a blue sail-like canopy and modern glass buildings, moving past decorative flower beds as a city bus crosses the frame. As the character advances, the open street narrows and the lighting shifts when the camera enters a claustrophobic construction walkway enclosed by metal scaffolding, wooden planks, and plywood walls. The scene then opens abruptly as the character emerges from the dark corridor into bright afternoon sunlight, revealing a palm-lined promenade with festive banners and pedestrians. Finally, the view expands to show a crashed vehicle on the right and distant mountains across the water under a clear sky.
